name: sd0x-dev-flow-codex
description: Codex-native engineering loop with dual review, deterministic verification, and fingerprinted completion gates.

interface.longDescription: A Codex-native engineering harness that combines a Claude MCP primary review with independent Codex implementation and test perspectives, all tied to the exact current worktree.
defaultPrompt: Implement this change and close the review loop.
Review my current worktree and fix actionable findings.
